name: Browser Control
summary: Drive browser actions through browser:// URI commands: forward to a noVNC/urirun node (desktop) or read/screenshot locally with headless Chrome.
description: Browser Control exposes browser actions as URI commands. The desktop target forwards to a noVNC or urirun node (BROWSER_CONTROL_ENDPOINT / URI_SERVICE_MAP). The chrome target drives a local headless Chrome/Chromium for read-only DOM/text queries and screenshots, with a safe dry-run when no Chrome is installed.
useCases: Open pages inside a controlled noVNC demo desktop.
Capture browser screenshots as URI flow artifacts.
Run repeatable browser QA from NL-to-URI workflows.
requires: browser runtime or noVNC urirun node
